'''thotahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labioscrotal|labioscrotal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labioscrotal|labioscrotal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thotahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotahithi|thotahithi]] || [[word:thotahiji|thotahiji]] || [[word:thotahishi|thotahishi]] || [[word:thotahiki|thotahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotahuthuthu|thotahuthuthu]] || [[word:thotahujuju|thotahujuju]] || [[word:thotahushushu|thotahushushu]] || [[word:thotahukuku|thotahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotahuthu|thotahuthu]] || [[word:thotahuju|thotahuju]] || [[word:thotahushu|thotahushu]] || [[word:thotahuku|thotahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotahufthuf|thotahufthuf]] || [[word:thotahufjuf|thotahufjuf]] || [[word:thotahufshuf|thotahufshuf]] || [[word:thotahufkuf|thotahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotahethe|thotahethe]] || [[word:thotaheje|thotaheje]] || [[word:thotaheshe|thotaheshe]] || [[word:thotaheke|thotaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotahothotho|thotahothotho]] || [[word:thotahojojo|thotahojojo]] || [[word:thotahoshosho|thotahoshosho]] || [[word:thotahokoko|thotahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotahotho|thotahotho]] || [[word:thotahojo|thotahojo]] || [[word:thotahosho|thotahosho]] || [[word:thotahoko|thotahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotahofthof|thotahofthof]] || [[word:thotahofjof|thotahofjof]] || [[word:thotahofshof|thotahofshof]] || [[word:thotahofkof|thotahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotahïfthïf|thotahïfthïf]] || [[word:thotahïfjïf|thotahïfjïf]] || [[word:thotahïfshïf|thotahïfshïf]] || [[word:thotahïfkïf|thotahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotahïfthïfthïf|thotahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thotahïfjïfjïf|thotahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thotahïfshïfshïf|thotahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thotahïfkïfkïf|thotahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotahïfthïf|thotahïfthïf]] || [[word:thotahïfjïf|thotahïfjïf]] || [[word:thotahïfshïf|thotahïfshïf]] || [[word:thotahïfkïf|thotahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotahïfthïf|thotahïfthïf]] || [[word:thotahïfjïf|thotahïfjïf]] || [[word:thotahïfshïf|thotahïfshïf]] || [[word:thotahïfkïf|thotahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thotahæthæ|thotahæthæ]] || [[word:thotahæjæ|thotahæjæ]] || [[word:thotahæshæ|thotahæshæ]] || [[word:thotahækæ|thotahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotahathatha|thotahathatha]] || [[word:thotahajaja|thotahajaja]] || [[word:thotahashasha|thotahashasha]] || [[word:thotahakaka|thotahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotahatha|thotahatha]] || [[word:thotahaja|thotahaja]] || [[word:thotahasha|thotahasha]] || [[word:thotahaka|thotahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotahafthaf|thotahafthaf]] || [[word:thotahafjaf|thotahafjaf]] || [[word:thotahafshaf|thotahafshaf]] || [[word:thotahafkaf|thotahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thotahasha|thotahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotahshësha|thotahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotahrosha|thotahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotahmusha|thotahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotahyasha|thotahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotahnkshësha|gothotahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotahnkrosha|gothotahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotahnkmusha|gothotahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotahnkyasha|gothotahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thotatahasha|thotatahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotatahshësha|thotatahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotatahrosha|thotatahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotatahmusha|thotatahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotatahyasha|thotatahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotatahnkshësha|gothotatahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotatahnkrosha|gothotatahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotatahnkmusha|gothotatahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotatahnkyasha|gothotatahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thetæhasha|thetæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thetæhshësha|thetæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thetæhrosha|thetæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thetæhmusha|thetæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thetæhyasha|thetæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothetæhnkshësha|gothetæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothetæhnkrosha|gothetæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothetæhnkmusha|gothetæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothetæhnkyasha|gothetæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thotfahasha|thotfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thotfahshësha|thotfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thotfahrosha|thotfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thotfahmusha|thotfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thotfahyasha|thotfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothotfahnkshësha|gothotfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothotfahnkrosha|gothotfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothotfahnkmusha|gothotfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothotfahnkyasha|gothotfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
